Senior LLM and enterprise AI engineer for production systems.

I design and deliver production-grade AI systems across model infrastructure, RAG, agent workflows, and enterprise applications. The focus is practical delivery: reliable architecture, strong technical judgment, and systems that hold up in regulated and operationally complex environments.

Execution focus
Enterprise AI built for production use

I focus on production AI systems where model quality, infrastructure decisions, and business fit all need to hold up in real deployment environments.

  • Production-grade LLM platforms, agentic workflows, and API-first delivery
  • Structured outputs, retrieval quality, and operational reliability

01

About

★ State AI Award — Hungary
★ Microsoft Ignite · ML Prague Speaker
★ IEEE Journal Reviewer
★ PhD Summa Cum Laude

Senior AI engineer with 15+ years spanning neuroscience, applied research, and production AI systems. In early 2022, I led the pretraining of HILANCO GPTX, a 6.7B-parameter bilingual English-Hungarian transformer on a government-backed NVIDIA DGX A100 cluster.

My focus today is enterprise AI delivery: NVIDIA infrastructure, LLM training and optimisation, production RAG, agentic workflows, and deployable systems for privacy-sensitive European and US environments.

04

Projects

Demo · B2B AI Infrastructure Planning Tool
On-Prem AI Workload, Serving & Capacity Planner
AI infrastructure sizing and workload simulation tool for B2B teams. Combines dynamic model profiles, on-prem serving compatibility checks, blueprint and advanced-template-based workload simulation, and Monte Carlo memory & capacity estimation — all in one interface. Designed to support early-stage infrastructure decisions before benchmarks begin.
GPU Sizing VRAM Planning Monte Carlo Blueprint Workloads On-Prem AI vLLM / CUDA Capacity Planning B2B Pre-Sales
  • Helps B2B teams select the right GPU server for current and future AI workloads, with estimated VRAM pressure and deployment risk surfaced early
  • Supports pre-sales and engineering alignment by making infrastructure constraints visible before deep technical validation starts
  • Covers serving stack selection, Monte Carlo memory estimation, and SLA hit rate simulation across workload scenarios
